englishDefinitions: Food that can be eaten with one's hands, as opposed to requiring utensils; often appetizers and snacks.
persianTranslation: غذایی که با دست می توان خورد، برخلاف نیاز به ظروف؛ اغلب پیش غذا و تنقلات
examples: He didn't serve a full lunch or dinner at the party, but there was plenty of finger food to munch.
